subject: A male warrior in plate armor swinging a flaming weapon at a massive horned beast in a fiery red landscape
description: A small male warrior in plate armor lunges with a glowing red weapon at a massive horned beast whose hide is the same red as the searing landscape. Sparks and embers fill the air. Mood is brutal — flavor text spells it out: 'There was no witty retort, no confident boast to accompany the attack. There was only pain.' The all-red palette gives the scene a hellscape quality.
foreground: Male warrior with flaming weapon mid-strike against a massive horned beast
background: Fiery red landscape filled with embers
